task.title: Title
task.dueTodayDescription: This task is due today. Complete it as soon as possible!

taskModal.titleMinLength: Title must be at least 3 characters

deleteModal.title: Confirm Remove Task
deleteModal.content: Are you sure you want to remove this task?

welcome.title: Welcome to Task Manager! 👋
welcome.description: Let's take a quick tour to show you how to manage your tasks efficiently. This will only take a minute!

newTask.title: Create Your First Task ✨
newTask.description: Click here to create a new task. Add a title, description, set priority levels (Low to Critical), choose a status, and set due dates to stay organized.

filters.title: Find Tasks Quickly 🔍
filters.description: Search by keywords, filter by status or priority, and clear filters with one click. Your filter settings are saved in the URL so you can bookmark and share filtered views.

taskColumns.title: Organized by Status 📋
taskColumns.description: Your tasks are organized into four columns: On Hold (paused tasks), Pending (not started), In Progress (actively working), and Completed (finished tasks).

taskCard.title: View Full Details 📄
taskCard.description: Click on any task card to open a detailed view with the full description, priority tags, due date alerts, and creation/update timestamps.

dragDrop.title: Drag & Drop to Update 🎯
dragDrop.description: Simply drag any task card and drop it into a different column to instantly change its status. Works on both desktop and mobile devices!

actions.title: Import, Export & More 💾
actions.description: Access powerful features: export your tasks to JSON, import tasks from files (with validation), download a template, and open settings to customize your experience.

settings.title: Customize Your Experience 🎨
settings.description: Switch between Light and Dark themes, change the interface language (English/Arabic with RTL support), and pick your favorite primary color.

importExport.noTasksInFile: No tasks found in the file
importExport.importConfirmContent: Found {{count}} task(s). Choose how to import:

about.title: About Task Manager
about.description: A modern, feature-rich task management application built with cutting-edge web technologies. Manage your tasks efficiently with an intuitive interface, powerful features, and full offline support.

taskManagement.title: Task Management
taskManagement.description: Create, edit, and delete tasks with title, description, priority, status, and due dates

dragDrop.title: Drag & Drop
dragDrop.description: Intuitive drag-and-drop interface to move tasks between status columns (Pending, In Progress, On Hold, Completed)

priorities.title: Priority Levels
priorities.description: Organize tasks by priority: Low, Medium, High, and Critical

analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.description: Track task completion rates, status distribution, priority breakdown, and overdue tasks

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Full support for English and Arabic with RTL layout for Arabic

theming.title: Theming
theming.description: Light and dark themes with customizable primary color

localStorage.title: Local Storage
localStorage.description: All data is stored locally in your browser - no server required

importExport.title: Import/Export
importExport.description: Export tasks to JSON and import with validation (merge or replace modes)

filters.title: Advanced Filters
filters.description: Filter tasks by search, status, priority, and overdue status with URL persistence

architecture.stateManagementDesc: Zustand for lightweight, performant global state with persistence
architecture.routingDesc: React Router v7 for seamless navigation
architecture.uiDesc: Ant Design for professional, accessible components with Tailwind CSS for custom styling
architecture.dndDesc: React DnD with multi-backend support for desktop and mobile devices
architecture.validationDesc: Comprehensive validation for task imports with detailed error reporting
